title: The Outlet.
content:
My river runs to thee:
    Blue sea, wilt welcome me?

    My river waits reply.
    Oh sea, look graciously!

    I'll fetch thee brooks
    From spotted nooks, --

    Say, sea,
    Take me!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Outlet."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
